title: Senior Software Engineer - Dunzo Capital India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dunzo Capital India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo Capital India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
